scripts.setup: pnpm run migrate && pnpm run seed
scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('dist/.build-stamp','financial-schema-foundation\n'); console.log('Prepared db build artifacts')"
scripts.typecheck: node --check scripts/verify-schema.mjs && node --check scripts/apply-sql-file.mjs && node --check scripts/seed-if-needed.mjs
